data.label: AI News Anchor
data.name: AI News Anchor
data.description: Research a topic using credible sources like BBC, CNN, Reuters, and AP, then generate a polished 60-second audio news segment with a professional anchor voice.
data.useCases: Get a quick audio briefing on any news topic; create a daily news clip; research and summarize breaking news into a spoken report

data.label: News Topic
data.description: The topic or event to research and report on (e.g. 'AI regulation in Europe', 'SpaceX latest launch')
data.placeholder: Enter the news topic to cover...

data.label: Research from Credible Sources
data.description: Search for the latest news on the topic using Perplexity Sonar. Focus on results from BBC, CNN, Reuters, AP, and other credible news outlets. Retrieve key facts, quotes, and context.

data.label: Write 60-Second News Script
data.instruction: Based on the research results, write a professional 60-second news anchor script (approximately 150 words). Structure it as: strong opening headline sentence, 3-4 key facts with attribution to sources (e.g. 'According to Reuters...'), one brief quote or expert opinion if available, and a closing summary sentence. Use clear, authoritative broadcast language. No filler words. The script should sound natural when read aloud.

data.label: Generate Anchor Audio (ElevenLabs)
data.description: Convert the 60-second news script into natural-sounding spoken audio using ElevenLabs TTS. Returns a base64-encoded MP3 file of the news segment.

data.label: Audio News Segment
data.description: The final audio news segment — a 60-second MP3 of the anchor reading the researched script. Delivered as a base64 MP3 or audio URL.

name: AI News Anchor
description: Research a topic using credible news sources and generate a 60-second audio news segment with a professional anchor voice.
